description: The single authoritative specification and contract for all physical media assets in 2 Second Witness.

universe_banner.prompt_specification: A highly polished thematic hero illustration for the '{id}' universe in an investigative world exploration and observation application. Theme: 2 Second Witness, deep atmosphere, clear focal observation structures, rich cinematic lighting, clean composition, masterpiece.

world_thumbnail.prompt_specification: A clean, striking world thumbnail illustration representing '{id}' in an investigative observation application. Theme: 2 Second Witness, high contrast, clear silhouettes, deep framing, masterpiece.

loading_background.prompt_specification: A deep, atmospheric background image for an investigative observation application. Theme: 2 Second Witness, mysterious framing, elegant cinematic lighting, wide angle, masterpiece.

app_icon.prompt_specification: A clean, iconic app icon for 2 Second Witness representing observation and discovery. Sharp vector shapes, high contrast, elegant dark background, masterpiece.

adaptive_icon_bg.prompt_specification: A rich, textured background layer for an adaptive Android app icon. Theme: 2 Second Witness, subtle dark geometry.

adaptive_icon_fg.prompt_specification: A crystal clear foreground vector symbol representing observation and investigation for 2 Second Witness.

feature_graphic.prompt_specification: A breathtaking promotional store feature graphic for 2 Second Witness. Bold composition, rich investigative atmosphere, sharp observation framing, masterpiece.

splash_image.prompt_specification: A striking splash branding image for 2 Second Witness.

visual_consistency_rules.framing: Every universe and world asset must maintain deep peripheral framing, drawing the viewer's focus directly into the central observation target.
visual_consistency_rules.visual_language: Sleek, high-contrast, investigative sci-fi vector aesthetic combined with rich organic accents.
visual_consistency_rules.quality: Flawless rendering, zero compression artifacts, crisp edges, and distinct silhouettes.
visual_consistency_rules.lighting_philosophy: Cinematic high-contrast lighting with vivid, thematic rim lights accentuating the primary observation structures.
visual_consistency_rules.composition: Centralized, balanced layout designed to function seamlessly within persistent UI viewport layers without visual clutter.
